title: Crucifera sisymbrium

However, I can provide information on Sisymbrium officinale, also known as Horned Poppy or Hedge Mustard.

Sisymbrium officinale is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Sisymbrium officinale include isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations.
